ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Input can use type=number, while locale-aware partial editing, stepper and scrub parity, canonical serialization, and bounded recovery context remain consumer work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves controlled or uncontrolled locale-aware number editing, native hidden form serialization and reset, stepper and scrub parity, with optional bounded status and exact canonical-value context.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas editing surfaces, precise Ink boundaries, strong tabular value hierarchy, restrained Green selection and Violet focus signals, stable status rails, logical layout, preference-safe motion, and shared radii make this part of the Mergora field family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A localized domain rail explains minimum and maximum recovery context and is linked to the editable input.

disabledBehavior.ui: No bounded-domain status rail is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Editing, validation, stepping, scrubbing, and serialization continue without generated range context.
disabledBehavior.events: No status-specific callback or event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No status ID is added to aria-describedby and no range context is added to the reading order.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A non-live machine-value preview exposes the exact JavaScript and form value without changing editing.

disabledBehavior.ui: No canonical-value row or data element is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Editing and form serialization remain unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No preview-specific callback or event is emitted.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No canonical-value context is added to the reading order or live announcements.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated naming, value text, keyboard, focus, forms, axe, narrow touch, RTL, forced-colors, and reduced-motion evidence is current; contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and mobile records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Controlled and uncontrolled editing, locale partial decimals, keyboard stepping, scrub pointer behavior, form serialization and reset, invalid and disabled states, narrow touch, RTL, and preferences are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and applicable mobile or touch evidence is not yet recorded.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

blockers.summary: Full matrix gates and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Checkbox can be composed into a group, while group-level minimum and maximum selection constraints, repeated FormData, and recovery messaging remain application work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora provides optional group-level minimum and maximum constraints synchronized with visible recovery, native validity, repeated form values, and controlled or uncontrolled state.

visualSignature.summary: Strong legend hierarchy, measured option rhythm, Ink structure, Green selection, Violet focus, and a stable danger rail match the Mergora field family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Minimum and maximum selected counts expose localized visible and native validity recovery.

api.enableWhen: Set minSelected, maxSelected, or required to activate a bounded selection constraint.

disabledBehavior.ui: No generated constraint recovery rail is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Selections remain native repeated successful controls without minimum or maximum enforcement.
disabledBehavior.events: onValueChange continues without constraint-specific interception.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No generated invalid state, error relationship, or native custom validity is added.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated legend, error linkage, validity, keyboard, touch, reflow, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Constraint transitions, controlled and uncontrolled ownership, disabled anchors, repeated FormData, and reset are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Full matrix gates and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Select replaces the native picker, while a native select with optional selected-value context and unchanged mobile picker semantics remains a separate composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves the browser picker, validation, reset, single or repeated serialization, and adds optional selected-value context through a bounded described-by rail.

visualSignature.summary: A literal Canvas picker, strong Ink edge, Violet two-layer focus, compact context rail, restrained corners, and native touch target match Mergora fields.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Persistent selection consequence or provenance text is linked to the native select without replacing its picker.

disabledBehavior.ui: No context rail is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Native option selection, validation, reset, and serialization are unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No context-specific event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No context ID or aria-describedby contribution is emitted.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated native naming, context linkage, keyboard, touch, reflow, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; desktop and mobile assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Native picker, listbox presentation, single and multiple values, validation, reset, and enhancement absence are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Mobile-picker checks and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Radio Group provides styled radio choices, while native form ownership, directional keyboard parity, and optional rich previews require additional composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves same-name native radios and directional keys while optionally adding bounded card previews with descriptions.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas options, Ink indicators, Green selected geometry, Violet focus, measured descriptions, and restrained corners identify Mergora selection controls.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Card geometry and item descriptions provide richer option comparison without adding proxy controls.

api.enableWhen: Set RadioGroupItem variant to card and optionally provide description.

disabledBehavior.ui: Items use the concise plain layout with no description rail.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The same native radios, arrow navigation, validation, reset, and serialization remain.
disabledBehavior.events: No preview-specific events are emitted.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No item-description ID is added when description is omitted.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated legend, description, native radio, directional keyboard, touch, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Arrow, Home, End, click, controlled state, reset, required validation, and form serialization are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Full matrix gates and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Switch exposes checked state but does not provide explicit on and off successful-control serialization by default.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora optionally serializes an explicit consumer-owned on or off value while keeping the switch button non-submitting and reset-aware.

visualSignature.summary: A compact Ink track, restrained corners, Green on state, strong label hierarchy, purposeful thumb motion, and Violet focus align Switch with Mergora.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A hidden successful control serializes explicit on and off machine values and follows form reset.

api.enableWhen: Provide a non-empty name; onValue and offValue remain consumer-owned.

disabledBehavior.ui: No hidden successful control is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Button switching and controlled or uncontrolled state continue without form serialization.
disabledBehavior.events: onValueChange remains unchanged and no serialization-specific event exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No additional accessible node or name contribution is emitted.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated stable naming, role and checked state, keyboard, touch, RTL, reduced-motion, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Click, keyboard activation, prevented events, controlled ownership, explicit FormData, external form association, and reset are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Full matrix gates and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Input can accept color text, while typed sRGB parsing, canonical form data, preview, and explicit contrast context remain application work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves partial locale-aware text editing against one immutable sRGB value and independently offers canonical preview and reference contrast analysis.

visualSignature.summary: The literal Canvas editor, strong Ink edge, exact machine-text hierarchy, Green accepted state, Violet focus seam, and status rails identify Mergora color fields.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A visual sample and exact canonical text expose the accepted typed color without replacing the editor.

disabledBehavior.ui: No swatch or canonical preview row is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Typed editing, validation, value ownership, and serialization continue unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No preview-specific event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No preview output or canonical preview text enters the reading order.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Reference contrast composites alpha against an explicit background and explains threshold context without claiming conformance.

api.enableWhen: Set showContrast to true and optionally provide the opaque reference background and threshold.

disabledBehavior.ui: No contrast output is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Parsing, preview, validation, and canonical value ownership continue without ratio calculation output.
disabledBehavior.events: No contrast-specific event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No contrast live output or threshold explanation enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated labelling, text alternatives, error recovery, live contrast output, keyboard, touch, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Partial editing, parsing, IME, paste, Enter, Escape, controlled ownership, native reset, canonical FormData, and enhancement absence are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Cross-browser color evidence and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn has no first-party spatial color picker with named channel alternatives, canonical exact entry, optional presets, and reference contrast output.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora unifies a spatial area, named channel sliders, exact typed entry, canonical serialization, and independently removable preview, contrast, and preset aids.

visualSignature.summary: Precise Ink geometry, literal Canvas controls, exact machine text, Green selected marks, Violet focus seams, and restrained layout make the picker Mergora rather than decorative chrome.

optionalEnhancements.summary: The embedded exact editor can expose a visual and canonical preview independently of spatial controls.

disabledBehavior.ui: No embedded preview swatch or canonical preview row is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Spatial, channel, exact editing, value ownership, and form serialization continue.
disabledBehavior.events: No preview-specific event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No preview output enters the reading order.

optionalEnhancements.summary: The embedded exact editor can expose reference contrast independently of preview and presets.

api.enableWhen: Set showContrast to true and optionally provide reference contrast inputs.

disabledBehavior.ui: No contrast output is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: All picker routes remain available without ratio output.
disabledBehavior.events: No contrast-specific event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No contrast live output or threshold explanation is emitted.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A named single-selection preset collection offers exact canonical alternatives without making color alone the label.

api.enableWhen: Provide one or more distinct swatches.

disabledBehavior.ui: No preset section or swatch choices are rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Spatial, channel, and exact editing continue without preset selection.
disabledBehavior.events: No swatch-specific change path exists because no swatch controls are mounted.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No preset collection, option names, or selected state enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated named alternatives, range semantics, exact text, preset names, keyboard, pointer, touch, reflow, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Area, slider, preset, exact text, controlled ownership, canonical FormData, reset, and enhancement-off paths are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Cross-browser color evidence and manual Risk Class 2 assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Input OTP provides segmented code entry, while a single native autofill control with configurable grouping and consumer-owned completion integration differs in ownership and recovery.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora keeps one native autofill, paste, reset, and form input while allowing visual grouping and an optional completion integration hook without automatic submission.

visualSignature.summary: One strong Ink control, literal Canvas cells, Green completion, Violet focus seam, tabular characters, and purposeful grouping identify Mergora credential entry.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A bounded completion callback lets the owning workflow integrate expiry or verification without automatic focus movement or submission.

api.enableWhen: Provide onComplete to observe each newly complete bounded value.

disabledBehavior.ui: The component renders no completion-specific UI.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Entry, normalization, autofill, paste, reset, validation, and serialization continue without completion integration.
disabledBehavior.events: No completion callback is invoked.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No completion announcement or additional accessibility output is emitted.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated single-tab-stop naming, grouping decoration, autofill hints, keyboard, paste, touch, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Controlled and uncontrolled entry, normalized paste, IME, completion deduplication, native FormData, reset, read-only, and disabled behavior are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Real-device autofill and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but autofill, release, and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Input can be configured as a password field, while explicit reusable-secret purpose, bounded segmentation, configurable paste policy, and completion integration remain consumer work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora distinguishes reusable secrets from OTPs, preserves one native password-manager input, and independently supports completion integration or an explicit reviewed paste-blocking policy.

visualSignature.summary: Strong Ink structure, Canvas segments, Green completeness, Violet focus, tabular entry, and a bounded warning rail align PinField with Mergora credentials.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A bounded completion callback integrates an owning verification workflow without submitting or authenticating.

api.enableWhen: Provide onComplete to observe each newly complete PIN value.

disabledBehavior.ui: The component renders no completion-specific UI.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Secure entry, paste, password-manager, reset, validation, and form behavior continue.
disabledBehavior.events: No completion callback is invoked.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No completion announcement or additional accessibility output is emitted.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A deliberately selected application policy can block paste without reading clipboard contents and explains the recovery path.

api.enableWhen: Set pastePolicy to block only after reviewing the accessibility and password-manager tradeoff.

disabledBehavior.ui: No paste warning rail is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Native paste and password-manager insertion remain allowed and normalized.
disabledBehavior.events: Paste is not canceled or read by the blocking path.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No paste-blocked status announcement is emitted.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated reusable-secret description, one-tab-stop naming, paste recovery, keyboard, touch, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; password-manager and manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Secure and visible entry, allowed and blocked paste, controlled and uncontrolled ownership, completion deduplication, native FormData, reset, and adverse states are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Password-manager checks and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but password-manager, release, and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn has no first-party inline editor that separates saved and draft values with async cancellation, stale-owner protection, native form serialization, and reset.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora provides explicit view, draft, save, cancel, async recovery, and committed-value serialization with an independently optional save-on-blur policy.

visualSignature.summary: Literal Canvas editing, strong Ink boundaries, explicit action hierarchy, Green success, Violet focus, stable status space, and restrained corners create a Mergora workbench editor.

optionalEnhancements.summary: An explicit policy validates and saves when focus leaves the entire editor while preserving the same protected save path.

disabledBehavior.ui: The visible editor and explicit Save and Cancel actions remain unchanged.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Moving focus away keeps the draft open until an explicit save or cancel action.
disabledBehavior.events: No save attempt is started solely by outside blur.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No pending, success, or error status is emitted from an outside blur.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated labels, focus restoration, error and live status, keyboard, touch, reflow, RTL, reduced-motion, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Input and textarea commands, IME, explicit and blur save, cancel, validation, async failure, abort, stale controlled ownership, FormData, and reset are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Lifecycle matrices and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn has no first-party rating input with native radio validation, form reset, read-only fractional display, localized value labels, and an explicit no-rating choice.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora uses native radios for every editable choice and independently offers an explicit no-rating control without conflating it with missing selection.

visualSignature.summary: Precise Ink choices, literal Canvas surfaces, Green selected geometry, Violet focus, strong numeric hierarchy, and restrained state motion match the Mergora field family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: An explicit native radio represents no rating and serializes an empty value without inventing a proxy action.

api.enableWhen: Set allowClear to true when an explicit no-rating value is valid.

disabledBehavior.ui: No no-rating choice is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Whole-number native rating choices, validation, reset, and serialization continue.
disabledBehavior.events: No empty-value selection can be emitted through a clear choice.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No clear radio or clear accessible name enters the group.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated legend, localized radio labels, native checked and required state, read-only text, keyboard, touch, RTL, forced-colors, and axe evidence is current; manual records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Arrow, Home, End, pointer, touch, clear, controlled state, native FormData, reset, required validation, and read-only fractional behavior are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Full matrix gates and manual assistive-technology sessions remain incomplete.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Focused source and browser evidence is current, but release and manual evidence gates remain open.
